story.title: Why Your Pizza Dough Never Works
story.logline: A home baker demonstrates step-by-step how to make pizza dough and addresses why most attempts fail on the first try.
story.setting: a clean kitchen prep counter with flour, yeast, and mixing tools
story.conflict_tension: Can this method deliver the intended pizza dough texture and rise on the first try?
story.visual_hook: Close-up of hands measuring and mixing key pizza dough ingredients precisely.
story.emotional_arc: Initial doubt about dough success shifts into confidence through clear technique.
story.ending_beat: Showing the proofed dough, baking it, and revealing the perfect final texture.
story.style_direction: premium documentary realism instructional demo for vertical 9:16 YouTube Shorts. Purpose: teach how to make pizza dough step by step with clear hands-on detail. Camera: handheld-inspired stability with observational framing. Lighting: natural motivated available light with soft contrast.

continuity_anchors.location: a clean kitchen prep counter with flour, yeast, and mixing tools
continuity_anchors.lighting: natural motivated available light with soft contrast
continuity_anchors.palette: neutral documentary color grade with selective warmth

clip_beats: Show all ingredients: flour, yeast, water, salt, and highlight hydration ratio; demonstrate measuring and mixing setup.
Demonstrate kneading technique focusing on gluten development; shape the dough into a smooth ball.
Place dough in a proofing bowl, cover, then show proofed dough; bake and slice to reveal texture.

facts: The viewer learns a practical method related to Make Pizza Dough.
settings: a clean kitchen prep counter with flour, yeast, and mixing tools
narrative_beats: Establish Make Pizza Dough in a clean kitchen prep counter with flour, yeast, and mixing tools.
